verdict_reason: If 2.45 were removed and only the chapter thesis plus 2.41-44 (the buddhi-yoga gateway and the obstruction-diagnosis) plus 2.46 (small water-pond) remained, would the engineering analog be reconstructible? No. The three-Mondays / sattva-rajas-tamas / niryoga-kṣema framing requires precisely 2.45's specific imperative cluster — nistrai-guṇya, nirdvandva, nitya-sattva-stha, niryoga-kṣema, ātmavān. 2.46 closes the Veda-scope arc with a different image (the small water-pond before the flood); 2.41-44 set up the obstruction without issuing the operative imperative. The 'baseline action across all three Mondays without claiming to transcend ontology' analog is unique to 2.45's combination of metaphysical imperative + scope-honesty about the operational reflection. PASS.
